rationale: Force both greatest_lower_bound_spec ensures into the proof context for r1 and r2, then case-split: if k1 != k2, either iter is end (the 'above' clause forces both k1<k2 and k2<k1) or iter is some (use the gap/between existential witness — the other key falls in the gap yet is in the map, contradiction). Then sortedness collapses k1==k2 to r1==r2.
